description_long: This is an adult male figure dressed in formal attire, featuring a fitted vest over a long-sleeve collared shirt and matching trousers. The shirt is buttoned up and complemented by a tie, giving a professional, business-like appearance. The vest is tailored and closely fitted, with the trousers falling straight to the ankles and ending at a pair of formal shoes. The figure's hair is neatly styled and short, with a clean-shaven face. The overall build is average, with arms extended horizontally to the sides. No accessories or carried objects are visible, and the clothing is well-fitted and appropriate for office or formal urban settings.
description: A formally dressed adult male in a vest, shirt, tie, and trousers, with short, neatly styled hair and formal shoes.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full formal outfit, tie, and facial features with arms extended.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the face, the fitted vest, and the straight cut of the trousers.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the vest, shirt, and trousers, with arms outstretched.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the side profile, the fit of the vest, and the shoes.
attribute_clothing_type: business suit with vest, collared shirt, tie, and formal trousers
attribute_posture: standing upright with arms extended horizontally
